title: Simply Business Partners with Arch Insurance to Expand Professional Liability Product Offering
text: BOSTON , Dec. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  Simply Business, LLC. , a Boston-based digital insurance company focused on small businesses, today announced a partnership with specialty insurer Arch Insurance to offer monoline professional liability solutions to small business owners in the United States.

title: Arch Insurance North America Announces Promotion of Brian First to President
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Arch Insurance North America (Arch) today announced that Brian First has been promoted to President of Arch Insurance North America, effective Dec. 1. First was promoted from Chief Underwriting Officer (CUO) of Programs, Property and Specialty, and he will continue to report to Matt Shulman, CEO of Arch Insurance North America.
